entities.name: Meeting Intelligence
entities.context: System for processing and organizing meeting-related intelligence files

entities.name: Registry
entities.context: Tracking system that records meeting status, intelligence paths, and completion timestamps

entities.name: Inbox
entities.context: Staging location for incoming meeting folders before processing

entities.name: Archive
entities.context: Storage location for versioned backups of old intelligence files

entities.name: Intelligence Files
entities.context: Processed meeting data stored as intelligence.md with metadata

relationships.context: Updates registry with status, path, block count, and completion timestamp after processing
Reads meeting folders from Inbox, marks with [P] suffix on failure
Old intelligence.md files are versioned and moved to archive folder
Processing workflow produces intelligence files as output
